title: Checkpoint Checkup
description: Allows you to check players' inventories
body:
it's simple, allows you to check other players inventories.

This was requested by someone on the MCreative discord

join the MCreative Discord! https://discord.gg/DJ5jxeG3HW

To check a player's inventory, simply look at a nearby player and press "c" (Or whatever the keybind is bound to)
